-- Create the main projects table
-- This stores all registered projects
/* Multi-line comment
   describing the schema
   version: v2.1 */
CREATE TABLE projects (
    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    version VARCHAR(50),
    status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'active',
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);
-- Insert initial data
INSERT INTO projects (name, version) VALUES ('OMNI', '0.4.4');
INSERT INTO projects (name, version) VALUES ('ForgePod', '1.2.0');
